body_transformation: Cubone's rounded head now features sharp, angular ear tips with electric blue fur that crackles with neon green sparks at the tips. The compact body retains its sturdy silhouette but gains a leaner, wiry frame with glowing circuit-like patterns tracing its tan and white fur. The curled tail tip now sports jagged lightning-bolt spines along its length, their edges flickering with vibrant yellow energy. Gray accents on the body transform into polished silver circuitry that pulses faintly with electric blue light.
signature_feature: Spine spines: jagged lightning-bolt shaped metal spines with glowing neon green circuit lines.
